content.query:
--CREATE TABLE dim_customer_gold_scd1
CREATE TABLE dbo.dim_customer_gold_scd1
(
    CUST_ID NVARCHAR(50),
    NAME_MASKED NVARCHAR(200),
    Risk_Score INT,
    KYC_Status NVARCHAR(50),
    updated_at DATETIME2
)
WITH
(
    DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
    HEAP
);

--CREATE TABLE dim_account_gold_scd1
CREATE TABLE dbo.dim_account_gold_scd1
(
    ACCOUNT_ID NVARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
    CUST_ID NVARCHAR(50),
    TYPE NVARCHAR(50),
    BALANCE DECIMAL(10,0),
    STATUS NVARCHAR(20),
    updated_at DATETIME2
)
WITH
(
    DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
    HEAP
);


--CREATE TABLE dim_customer_gold_scd2
CREATE TABLE dbo.dim_customer_gold_scd2
(
    CUST_ID VARCHAR(50),
    NAME_MASKED VARCHAR(200),
    Risk_Score INT,
    KYC_Status VARCHAR(50),
    updated_at DATETIME2,
    start_at DATETIME2,
    end_at DATETIME2
)
WITH
(
    DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
    CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
);

--TABLE dim_account_gold_scd2

CREATE TABLE dbo.dim_account_gold_scd2
(
    ACCOUNT_ID NVARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
    CUST_ID NVARCHAR(50),
    TYPE NVARCHAR(50),
    BALANCE DECIMAL(10,0),
    STATUS NVARCHAR(20),
    updated_at DATETIME2,
    __START_AT DATETIME2,
    __END_AT DATETIME2
)
WITH
(
    DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
    HEAP
);
--MATERIALIZED VIEW

CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW dbo.mv_fraud_aggregates
WITH
(
    DISTRIBUTION = HASH(merchant_cat)
)
AS
SELECT
    f.merchant_cat,
    c.Risk_Score,
    COUNT_BIG(f.txn_id) AS total_transactions,
    SUM(ISNULL(f.amount,0)) AS total_amount,
    COUNT_BIG(*) AS cb
FROM dbo.fact_wide_transactions f
INNER JOIN dbo.dim_customer_gold_scd1 c
ON f.CUST_ID = c.CUST_ID
GROUP BY
    f.merchant_cat,
    c.Risk_Score;

--FACT_WIDE_TRANSACTIONS

CREATE TABLE dbo.fact_wide_transactions
(
    txn_id VARCHAR(50),
    ACCOUNT_ID VARCHAR(50),
    card_id VARCHAR(50),
    amount FLOAT,
    merchant_cat VARCHAR(100),
    transaction_timestamp DATETIME2,
    transaction_date DATE,
    transaction_hour INT,
    transaction_status VARCHAR(50),
    amount_bucket VARCHAR(50),
    silver_load_time DATETIME2,
    CUST_ID VARCHAR(50),
    NAME_MASKED VARCHAR(200),
    Risk_Score INT,
    KYC_Status VARCHAR(50),
    TYPE VARCHAR(50),
    BALANCE FLOAT,
    STATUS VARCHAR(50),
    gold_load_time DATETIME2,
    rn INT
)
WITH
(
    DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
    CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
);

--FACT_ACCOUNT_TRANSACTIONS
CREATE TABLE dbo.fact_account_transactions
(
    transaction_date DATE,
    ACCOUNT_ID VARCHAR(50),
    total_transactions BIGINT,
    total_amount FLOAT,
    average_amount FLOAT,
    successful_transactions BIGINT
)
WITH
(
    DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
    CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
);




SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM dbo.dim_customer_gold_scd1;

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM dbo.dim_account_gold_scd1;

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM dbo.fact_wide_transactions;

SELECT *
FROM dbo.mv_fraud_aggregates;
